name: Goat Cheese-And-Walnut Pizza Topping
recipeInstructions:
1. CRUMBLE THE GOAT CHEESE and sprinkle it all over the pizza.
2. In a small bowl, toss the walnuts with the walnut or safflower oil to coat.
3. Place the walnuts all over the pizza.
4. Bake according to directions.
Makes Enough for 2 9-Inch Pizzas
PETER KUMP - PRODIGY GUEST CHEFS COOKBOOK
